name: urf-core

name: chronos-urf-rr

No UniversalFiberEntropyGap from Reg-SNF, no DepthBridge extension beyond selected final carrier domain, no Chronos-RR, H4.1/FGL, P vs NP, or Clay-problem closure is claimed.

name: Private/Internal Verification Surfaces
